### Crack the Gate 1

![][image1]  
Check the source code first

![][image2]  
This may be dev has been forgotten to remove.   
![][image3]  
I guess this means ROT13. So I use CyberChef to decrypt this.  
![][image4]  
And that we got the way to break this form login.  
Email will be:**ctf-player@picoctf.org**  
password is not needed, and you can fill anything. we will use Burp Suite to add “X-Dev-Access: yes” to the header.  
![][image5]

And that's the way we get flag.
